name: elevo11--weather-plus
description: Get current weather, multi-day forecasts, clothing index, and feels-like temperature. No API key required. Use when a user wants to: (1) Check current weather, (2) View multi-day forecasts, (3) Get clothing/dressing recommendations, (4) Check feels-like temperature and comfort index. Supports any city worldwide. Integrates SkillPay.me at 0.001 USDT/call.
